relationship_to_headline: This Pine Script track is a related implementation study, not the exact 30-minute filtered Python engine behind the dashboard headline metrics.

versions.title: Symmetric baseline
versions.change: Established the ungated two-sided 15-minute opening-range breakout with one decision per session, a 1R target, opposite-range stop, and fixed-contract sizing.
versions.why: The research arc rejected the attempted direction and confluence filters, leaving the symmetric breakout as the simpler falsifiable baseline.
versions.evidence_status: Historical baseline; later operational builds supersede it.
versions.known_limitations: Fixed sizing makes dollar risk vary with opening-range width. The source header preserves contemporaneous estimates that were later corrected.

versions.title: Dynamic dollar-risk sizing
versions.change: Replaced fixed sizing with a capped dollar-risk budget while retaining a fixed-contract parity mode and the original entry/exit path.
versions.why: Normalize the dollar distribution across narrow and wide opening ranges without introducing a new predictive rule.
versions.evidence_status: Sizing study passed its registered comparison; later versions retain the mechanism.
versions.known_limitations: The sizing result is configuration-dependent and does not establish that higher size improves strategy edge.

versions.title: Optional MGC margin filter
versions.change: Added one frozen, default-off breakout-margin skip for MGC only; it is ignored on MNQ and still locks the session when triggered.
versions.why: One MGC-only cell survived a preregistered confirmation battery, while the same filter removed profitable MNQ trades.
versions.evidence_status: Weak single-symbol survivor; intentionally optional and default off.
versions.known_limitations: A lone survivor after multiple tests can still be a false discovery and is not evidence for applying the rule to MNQ.

versions.title: Early-close operating guard
versions.change: Added a user-maintained early-close calendar guard and later simplified chart drawings without changing the ordinary-session decision path.
versions.why: Mechanize the rule that positions must be flat before shortened-session halts instead of relying on a manual reminder.
versions.evidence_status: Guard mechanism replayed in the combined script; superseded by symbol-locked v4.1 controls.
versions.known_limitations: The calendar is not auto-detected and silently becomes stale unless maintained and replay-tested.

versions.title: MNQ symbol-locked paper control
versions.change: Split the combined script into an MNQ-only control, hard-disabled the MGC-only filter, updated commission, and enabled the early-close guard by default.
versions.why: Reduce wrong-symbol and configuration risk before observation-only paper validation.
versions.evidence_status: TradingView compile/run and 1,269-trade path parity passed; interactive acceptance remains partial.
versions.known_limitations: Wrong-symbol UI, chart/alert behavior, and a split-script historical half-day replay remain open. It is not authorized for live execution.
